The quarterly results exceeded our expectations significantly. We believe this demonstrates a genuine commitment to sustainable growth over the long term. However, some challenges remain in the supply chain, particularly regarding semiconductor shortages. Our team is working diligently to address these bottlenecks. I would argue that the fundamentals are strong, perhaps stronger than they have been in years. Consider the evidence: margins improved, customer retention increased, and new market segments opened up. We need to maintain this momentum going forward, while being mindful of the risks that could derail our progress.
